overall.description: A third-person game scene depicting a character in a long coat carrying a body through a snowy rural landscape at night. The character traverses a path lined with warm lantern posts and passes wooden structures in a dark, atmospheric winter setting with cinematic blue-toned lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy field with scattered evergreen trees

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through deep snow carrying a large object wrapped in cloth over the right shoulder

tall pine trees scattered across the snowy landscape
warm orange lights visible in the distance along the path
large dark silhouette of a wooden building or ruin

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide open snowy field at night, with scattered evergreen trees visible in the distance. Warm lantern lights glow ahead along the path, and a large dark wooden structure looms far to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy path lined with wooden lantern posts

events.description: character passes close to a lit lantern post, casting warm orange light on the snow
small white wooden shed comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the path, passing wooden lantern posts that illuminate the snowy ground

entered.detail: tall wooden post with warm glowing lantern at the top
small white wooden structure with sloped roof partially covered in snow
broken wooden cart or pile of lumber partially buried in snow

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a defined snowy path lined with warm lantern posts. A small white wooden shed appears on the right, and the character passes wooden debris and broken carts while the large dark structure draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path alongside large dark wooden structure

events.description: character passes the white shed and enters a darker, more enclosed area with a large structure on the right

agents.ego_description: walks past the shed and continues along the narrowing path beside a large dark building

entered.detail: tall dark wooden building or cliff face looming immediately to the right of the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes the white wooden shed and enters a darker, more confined space with a massive dark wooden structure immediately to the right. The path narrows and the lighting becomes dimmer as the character continues toward distant lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast, snowy expanse that gradually tightens into a confined, shadowed corridor. It begins in a wide open field at night, where the character walks toward a distant line of warm lantern lights under a dark sky with scattered evergreen trees. As the character moves along the defined snowy path, the environment becomes more cluttered with wooden debris and broken carts, passing a small white shed while a massive dark structure looms closer on the right. The scene then shifts into a more oppressive atmosphere as the path narrows and the lighting dims, pressing the character against the towering wooden wall of the structure. Finally, the camera follows the figure deeper into this darkened space, moving away from the open field toward a few remaining distant lights.
